trades.market: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (LOW) $95 Week of March 30 2026?
trades.research_summary: Multiple sources confirm WTI traded in the $95-$100 range as of March 30. WSJ documented WTI surging to $95/barrel. May 2026 futures priced at $93-$95. Research explicitly states WTI already reached the $95 threshold during the target week. The $95 level appears to have been touched on the downside during normal trading.
key_factors: WTI confirmed trading at $95-$100 range during the target week (March 30)
May 2026 futures priced at $93-$95, confirming $95 level was reached
WSJ report corroborates WTI at $95 per barrel during this period
trades.bear_case: Ambiguity in resolution criteria — if 'hit LOW $95' requires a specific intraday tick at exactly $95.00 rather than trading near/at $95, outcome could differ; low volume ($100) may limit execution

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 36°C on April 3?
trades.research_summary: Today (April 2) Lucknow already recorded 37.78°C with a forecasted high of 39.35°C. Historical April averages show mid-month highs of 37.6°C. Current conditions are running 2-3°C above the 36°C target, and early April temperatures in North India trend upward.
key_factors: Today's actual high of 37.78°C already 1.78°C above the 36°C target
Forecast for today is 39.35°C suggesting even hotter conditions
Early April upward temperature trend in North India makes cooling to exactly 36°C unlikely
trades.bear_case: Unexpected cloud cover, rain, or weather system change could drop temperatures; no specific April 3 forecast was found in research

trades.market: Will 'BULLY' - Ye debut week album sales be less than 150k?
trades.research_summary: Multiple sources describe first-week sales projections as 'astronomical' and 'massive'. Polymarket prices the equivalent question at ~25% YES (under 150k), yet this market sits at 88% YES — a massive cross-platform discrepancy. Kalshi data shows ~100k pure album sales plus strong vinyl, with streaming equivalents likely pushing total well past 150k.
key_factors: Polymarket prices same question at ~25% YES vs 88% here — enormous discrepancy
Multiple independent sources use 'astronomical'/'massive' to describe projected sales
~100k pure sales + vinyl + streaming equivalents likely exceeds 150k total
trades.bear_case: Missing specific HDD April 1 tracking number; resolution criteria could differ between platforms; minimal promotion could have depressed streaming numbers more than expected

trades.market: Will the price of Solana be above $80 on April 3?
trades.research_summary: Multiple real-time price sources show SOL trading at $82-$84 (Changelly: $83.79, Yahoo Finance: $82.71). Market closes today April 3. Price would need an unusual 3-5% single-day crash to drop below $80. Recent low was $79.09 five days ago but price has recovered and stabilized above $82.
key_factors: Three independent sources confirm current SOL price at $82-$84, well above the $80 threshold
Market closes today—this is essentially resolved, not a prediction
Would require an unusual 4%+ intraday crash to move below $80
trades.bear_case: Crypto volatility is real—SOL briefly touched $79.09 just 5 days ago, and a sudden sell-off or black swan event could push it below $80 before market close

trades.market: Will there be at least 2200 measles cases in the U.S. by April 30, 2026?
trades.research_summary: CDC data shows 1,575 confirmed measles cases as of March 26 (day 85 of 2026), averaging 18.5 cases/day. Simple linear extrapolation over remaining 35 days yields ~2,222 cases — clearing the 2,200 threshold. 16 active outbreaks with 94% outbreak-linked transmission indicate sustained case generation. Research brief characterizes YES as 'moderately likely,' dramatically above the 6% market price.
key_factors: Linear extrapolation of 18.5 cases/day average already clears 2,200 target by April 30
16 active outbreaks with sustained outbreak-associated transmission
2026 already tracking at 3x the 2025 daily case rate (worst since 2000)
CDC reporting lag may mean current count already higher than last reported 1,575
trades.bear_case: Sharp deceleration in daily case rate not captured in available data; public health interventions containing active outbreaks; seasonal decline in measles transmission already underway

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 28°C or below on April 8?
trades.research_summary: Lucknow recorded 37.07°C high on April 4. The 28°C threshold requires a 9°C drop in daily highs within 4 days during peak April heating season. No weather system or forecast data in research suggests such an extreme cooling event. Lucknow April average highs are 36-39°C; sub-28°C highs are historically near-record territory.
key_factors: Current high 37.07°C is 9°C above the 28°C threshold — extraordinary drop needed
April is Lucknow's peak pre-monsoon heating season with average highs 36-39°C
No forecast evidence of incoming weather system capable of such extreme cooling
trades.bear_case: Severe Western Disturbance or unprecedented pre-monsoon storm system could suppress temps, and I previously lost a Lucknow weather bet on unexpected weather changes — but a 9°C drop in highs far exceeds typical weather-system cooling of 5-7°C

trades.market: Will Trump say "Iran" during the White House Easter Egg Roll?
trades.research_summary: Trump gave major national address on Iran April 1 with extreme rhetoric. April 6 is simultaneously the Easter Egg Roll AND the stated deadline for Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Trump has invoked Iran at virtually every public appearance for weeks. Media presence at the event makes Iran questions near-certain on deadline day. Resolution only requires saying the word once.
key_factors: April 6 Iran/Hormuz deadline coincides exactly with Easter Egg Roll date
Trump obsessively focused on Iran - national address 5 days prior
Media present will almost certainly ask about Iran crisis on deadline day
Resolution bar extremely low - just needs to say the word once
Trump historically goes off-script and engages reporters at public events
trades.bear_case: Easter Egg Roll is a children's event; staff could successfully keep Trump on brief scripted remarks with no media Q&A, and Trump might deliberately avoid the topic at a family event
